Title: Save a card
Content:
To simplify the payment process for returning customers, Xendit's card tokenization offers a secure and efficient solution by allowing you to safely store customer card details. This eliminates the need for customers to re-enter their information for every purchase, leading to a smoother checkout process. You can store multiple cards per customer with One-Click Payments with CVN or Merchant-Initiated Transactions.

Store card flow

Private notes

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Store card details
 Client ->> Server: Store card initiation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_token_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes authentication  process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_token_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_token_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment_token webhook
 Server ->> Server: Store token_details

How to integrate

  1. Create a payment session

    To begin the tokenization process, you need to create a payment session with Xendit. The session_type must be SAVE, and the amount must be 0.

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 0,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Response - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 0,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-d7b12124-3dd1-471a-bf37-c956f44c2a2c",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-28T07:33:19.376Z",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": false
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Collect the card information

Implement {{variable.card_session_js}} to collect card information.

Request - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Request using cards_sessions_js

const cardData = {
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Xendit.payment.collectCardData(cardData, responseHandler);

Response - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Handle the response message
const xenditResponseHandler = async (err, response) => { 
    console.log (response);
}
// The response object will look similar to this:
{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "action_url": "REDIRECT_URL" 
}

Important: You must store the payment_token_id returned in this response and send it to your server. This payment_token_id is crucial for tracking the status of the card tokenization and for future transactions.

  1. Redirect to the authentication page

    After collecting card information, your customer will have to be redirected to a 3D Secure (3DS) authentication page hosted by the issuing bank. Upon successful authentication, the customer will be redirected back to your specified success page (e.g. https://yourcompany.com/success).

  2. Receive the webhook

    Xendit sends a payment token webhook to your webhook endpoint providing updates on the activation progress of the payment token. Make sure to listen to the webhook to confirm the status of storing the card.

Example payment_token.activation webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.601Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment_token.activation",
    "data": {
        "status": "ACTIVE",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:19.330Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.215Z",
        "currency": "IDR",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-9f02010d-1189-4f2c-95e9-fe7f52fdd29b",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "efe51f0c-ea1f-45ec-96e4-5275db384d68_1b0d11cd-a",
        "token_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7344942402526026003955",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435203752181",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            }
        },
        "payment_token_id": "pt-eda13864-5091-4bd2-b88d-ae640be90ee7",
        "channel_properties": {
            "card_details": {
                "type": "CREDIT",
                "issuer": "BRI",
                "country": "ID",
                "network": "VISA",
                "expiry_year": "2040",
                "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "cardholder_email": "test@yourdomain.com",
                "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
                "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
                "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
                "cardholder_phone_number": "+62812347290"
            },
            "skip_three_ds": true,
            "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
            "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
            "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success"
        }
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

  1. Retrieving the stored card

    After the card has been successfully tokenized (and you've received the payment_token.activation webhook), you can retrieve the token details by making a GET request to payment_tokens/YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID.

    Response - /v3/payment_tokens

    {   
    "payment_token_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "customer_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "actions": [],
    "created": "2024-12-05T02:05:56.176308Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-05T02:19:02.935905Z",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "cardholder_first_name": "Jaap",
            "cardholder_last_name": "Stam",
            "cardholder_email": "Jaap@stam.com",
            "cardholder_phone_number": "+6512341234",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2040",
            "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "BRI"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "card_verification_results": {
            "three_ds_data": {
                "three_ds_flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "eci_code": "05",
                "three_ds_result": "AUTHENTICATED",
                "three_ds_result_reason": null,
                "three_ds_version": "2.1.0"
            },
            "cvn_result": null,
            "address_verification_result": "MATCH"
        }
    },
    "channel_code": "CARDS"
}

Use payment token for future transactions

Once a payment token is generated, it acts as a secure reference to the end user's stored card details. You can use this token for future transactions, based on your consent agreement with the end user.

Common Use Cases for Payment Tokens:

  1. Customer-Initiated Transactions (Returning Customers) - enables users to seamlessly use stored cards for their next purchase. To improve the success rate, we recommend prompting users to re-enter their CVN when completing the transaction. See our integration guide

  2. Merchant-Initiated Transactions (Recurring Payments) - you can initiate the transaction without end-user interaction (e.g., for subscriptions or auto-debits). Ideal for subscription-based services, memberships, and automated billing. See our integration guide

Private notes

Retrieving multiple stored cards (NOT SUPPORTED YET)

When requesting the payment methods we return all cards stored for a specific shopper, Xendit returns the masked card number, as well as the expiry date.

For example, the same shopper could have two cards stored - when requesting the stored payment methods with Xendit, those two cards would be returned as such:

Masked card number

Expiry date

431245 **** **** 5512

11/32

512512 **** **** 1241

07/30

Sample request to retrieve stored card details

Request -

{ 
  THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}

Response from

{   
 THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}
Description: How to store/save a card with Xendit

Title: Simpan kartu dengan satu klik
Content:
Untuk menyederhanakan proses pembayaran bagi pelanggan yang kembali, tokenisasi kartu Xendit menawarkan solusi untuk menyimpan detail kartu pelanggan dengan aman dan efisien. Ini menghilangkan kebutuhan pembeli untuk memasukkan kembali informasi mereka pada setiap pembelian, sehingga menghasilkan proses checkout yang lebih lancar.. Anda dapat menyimpan beberapa kartu per pembeli dengan One-Click Payments with CVN atau Merchant-Initiated Transactions.

Alur penyimpanan kartu

Catatan pribadi

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Store card details
 Client ->> Server: Store card initiation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_token_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes authentication  process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_token_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_token_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment_token webhook
 Server ->> Server: Store token_details

Cara integrasi

  1. Buat payment session

    Untuk memulai proses tokenisasi, Anda perlu membuat sesi pembayaran dengan Xendit. session_type harus SAVE, dan amount harus 0.

Permintaan - POST /sesi

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 0,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Permintaan - POST /sesi

{
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 0,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-d7b12124-3dd1-471a-bf37-c956f44c2a2c",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-28T07:33:19.376Z",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": false
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Kumpulkan informasi kartu

    Terapkan {{variable.card_session_js}} untuk mengumpulkan informasi kartu.

Permintaan - {{variable.card_session_js}}

{ 
    card_number: "4000000000001091"
    cardholder_email: "sample@email.com"
    cardholder_first_name: "firstName"
    cardholder_last_name: "lastName"
    cardholder_phone_number: "+6512341234"
    cvn: "123",
    expiry_month: "12"
    expiry_year: "2040"
    payment_session_id: "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

response - {{variable.card_session_js}}

{   "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_token_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "action_url": "REDIRECT_URL" 
}

Penting: Anda harus menyimpan payment_token_id yang dikembalikan dalam respons ini dan mengirimkannya ke server Anda. payment_token_id ini sangat penting untuk melacak status tokenisasi kartu dan untuk transaksi di masa mendatang.

  1. Alihkan ke halaman autentikasi

    Setelah mengumpulkan informasi kartu, pelanggan Anda akan diarahkan ke halaman otentikasi 3D Secure (3DS) yang dihosting oleh bank penerbit. Setelah autentikasi berhasil, pelanggan akan diarahkan kembali ke halaman keberhasilan yang Anda tentukan (misalnya https://yourcompany.com/success).

  2. Terima webhook

    Xendit mengirimkan token pembayaran webhook ke endpoint webhook Anda yang memberikan update tentang aktivasi token pembayaran. Pastikan Anda mendengarkan webhook untuk mengonfirmasi status penyimpanan kartu.

Contoh webhook payment_token.activation:

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.601Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment_token.activation",
    "data": {
        "status": "ACTIVE",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:19.330Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.215Z",
        "currency": "IDR",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-9f02010d-1189-4f2c-95e9-fe7f52fdd29b",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "efe51f0c-ea1f-45ec-96e4-5275db384d68_1b0d11cd-a",
        "token_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7344942402526026003955",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435203752181",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            }
        },
        "payment_token_id": "pt-eda13864-5091-4bd2-b88d-ae640be90ee7",
        "channel_properties": {
            "card_details": {
                "type": "CREDIT",
                "issuer": "BRI",
                "country": "ID",
                "network": "VISA",
                "expiry_year": "2040",
                "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "cardholder_email": "test@yourdomain.com",
                "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
                "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
                "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
                "cardholder_phone_number": "+62812347290"
            },
            "skip_three_ds": true,
            "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
            "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
            "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success"
        }
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

  1. Mengambil detail kartu yang disimpan

    Setelah kartu berhasil ditokenisasi (dan Anda telah menerima webhook), payment_token.activation Anda dapat mengambil detail token dengan membuat permintaan GET ke payment_tokens/YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID.

response - /v3/payment_tokens

{   
    "payment_token_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "customer_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "actions": [],
    "created": "2024-12-05T02:05:56.176308Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-05T02:19:02.935905Z",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "cardholder_first_name": "Jaap",
            "cardholder_last_name": "Stam",
            "cardholder_email": "Jaap@stam.com",
            "cardholder_phone_number": "+6512341234",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2040",
            "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "BRI"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "card_verification_results": {
            "three_ds_data": {
                "three_ds_flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "eci_code": "05",
                "three_ds_result": "AUTHENTICATED",
                "three_ds_result_reason": null,
                "three_ds_version": "2.1.0"
            },
            "cvn_result": null,
            "address_verification_result": "MATCH"
        }
    },
    "channel_code": "CARDS"
}

Gunakan token pembayaran untuk transaksi di masa mendatang

Setelah token pembayaran dihasilkan, token ini bertindak sebagai referensi aman ke detail kartu yang disimpan pengguna akhir. Anda dapat menggunakan token ini untuk transaksi di masa mendatang, berdasarkan perjanjian persetujuan Anda dengan pengguna akhir.

Use case untuk token pembayaran:

  1. Customer-Initiated Transactions (Returning Customers) - memungkinkan pengguna untuk menggunakan kartu yang disimpan dengan mulus untuk pembelian berikutnya. Untuk meningkatkan tingkat keberhasilan, sebaiknya minta pengguna untuk memasukkan kembali CVN mereka saat menyelesaikan transaksi. Lihat panduan integrasi

  2. Merchant-Initiated Transactions (Recurring Payments) - Anda dapat memulai transaksi tanpa interaksi pengguna akhir (misalnya, untuk langganan atau debit otomatis). Ideal untuk layanan berbasis langganan, keanggotaan, dan penagihan otomatis. Lihat panduan integrasi

Catatan pribadi

Mengambil beberapa kartu yang disimpan (BELUM DIDUKUNG)

Saat meminta metode pembayaran, kami mengembalikan semua kartu yang disimpan untuk pembeli tertentu, Xendit mengembalikan nomor kartu bertopeng, serta tanggal kedaluwarsa.

Misalnya, pembeli yang sama dapat menyimpan dua kartu - saat meminta metode pembayaran yang disimpan dengan Xendit, kedua kartu tersebut akan dikembalikan seperti itu:

Nomor kartu bertopeng

Tanggal kedaluwarsa

431245 **** **** 5512

11/32

512512 **** **** 1241

07/30

Contoh permintaan untuk mengambil detail kartu yang disimpan

Minta-

{ 
  THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}

response dari

{   
 THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}

Title: บันทึกบัตร
Content:
เพื่อให้กระบวนการชำระเงินง่ายขึ้นสำหรับลูกค้าที่กลับมาใช้บริการอีกครั้ง card tokenization ของ Xendit นำเสนอโซลูชันที่ปลอดภัยและมีประสิทธิภาพ โดยอนุญาตให้คุณจัดเก็บรายละเอียดบัตรของลูกค้าได้อย่างปลอดภัย ซึ่งช่วยลดความจำเป็นที่ลูกค้าจะต้องป้อนข้อมูลซ้ำสำหรับการซื้อทุกครั้ง ทำให้กระบวนการชำระเงินราบรื่นยิ่งขึ้น คุณสามารถจัดเก็บบัตรหลายใบต่อลูกค้าหนึ่งรายได้ด้วย One-Click Payments with CVN หรือ Merchant-Initiated Transactions.

ขั้นตอนการจัดเก็บบัตร

บันทึกส่วนตัว

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Store card details
 Client ->> Server: Store card initiation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_token_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes authentication  process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_token_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_token_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment_token webhook
 Server ->> Server: Store token_details

วิธีการเชื่อมต่อ

  1. สร้าง payment session

    ในการเริ่มต้นกระบวนการ tokenization คุณต้องสร้าง payment session กับ Xendit โดยที่ session_type ต้องเป็น SAVE และ amount ต้องเป็น 0

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 0,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 0,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-d7b12124-3dd1-471a-bf37-c956f44c2a2c",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-28T07:33:19.376Z",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": false
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. รวบรวมข้อมูลบัตร

ใช้ {{variable.card_session_js}} เพื่อ รวบรวมข้อมูลบัตร

Request - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Request using cards_sessions_js

const cardData = {
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Xendit.payment.collectCardData(cardData, responseHandler);

Response - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Handle the response message
const xenditResponseHandler = async (err, response) => { 
    console.log (response);
}
// The response object will look similar to this:
{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "action_url": "REDIRECT_URL" 
}

สำคัญ: คุณต้องจัดเก็บ payment_token_id ที่ส่งกลับมาใน response นี้และส่งไปยัง server ของคุณ payment_token_id นี้มีความสำคัญอย่างยิ่งสำหรับการติดตามสถานะของ card tokenization และสำหรับการทำธุรกรรมในอนาคต

  1. เปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้า authentication

    หลังจากรวบรวมข้อมูลบัตรแล้ว ลูกค้าของคุณจะต้องถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้า 3D Secure (3DS) authentication ซึ่งโฮสต์โดยธนาคารผู้ออกบัตร เมื่อ authentication สำเร็จ ลูกค้าจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางกลับไปยังหน้า success ที่คุณระบุ (เช่น https://yourcompany.com/success)

  2. รับ webhook

    Xendit จะส่ง payment token webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ของคุณ เพื่อแจ้งความคืบหน้าในการเปิดใช้งาน payment token โปรดตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าคุณรับฟัง webhook เพื่อยืนยันสถานะของการจัดเก็บบัตร

ตัวอย่าง payment_token.activation webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.601Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment_token.activation",
    "data": {
        "status": "ACTIVE",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:19.330Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.215Z",
        "currency": "IDR",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-9f02010d-1189-4f2c-95e9-fe7f52fdd29b",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "efe51f0c-ea1f-45ec-96e4-5275db384d68_1b0d11cd-a",
        "token_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7344942402526026003955",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435203752181",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            }
        },
        "payment_token_id": "pt-eda13864-5091-4bd2-b88d-ae640be90ee7",
        "channel_properties": {
            "card_details": {
                "type": "CREDIT",
                "issuer": "BRI",
                "country": "ID",
                "network": "VISA",
                "expiry_year": "2040",
                "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "cardholder_email": "test@yourdomain.com",
                "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
                "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
                "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
                "cardholder_phone_number": "+62812347290"
            },
            "skip_three_ds": true,
            "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
            "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
            "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success"
        }
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

  1. การเรียกดูบัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้

    หลังจากที่บัตรได้รับการ tokenized สำเร็จ (และคุณได้รับ payment_token.activation webhook แล้ว) คุณสามารถเรียกดูรายละเอียด token ได้โดยการส่งคำขอ GET ไปยัง payment_tokens/YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID

    Response - /v3/payment_tokens

    {   
    "payment_token_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "customer_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "actions": [],
    "created": "2024-12-05T02:05:56.176308Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-05T02:19:02.935905Z",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "cardholder_first_name": "Jaap",
            "cardholder_last_name": "Stam",
            "cardholder_email": "Jaap@stam.com",
            "cardholder_phone_number": "+6512341234",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2040",
            "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "BRI"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "card_verification_results": {
            "three_ds_data": {
                "three_ds_flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "eci_code": "05",
                "three_ds_result": "AUTHENTICATED",
                "three_ds_result_reason": null,
                "three_ds_version": "2.1.0"
            },
            "cvn_result": null,
            "address_verification_result": "MATCH"
        }
    },
    "channel_code": "CARDS"
}

การใช้ payment token สำหรับธุรกรรมในอนาคต

เมื่อ payment token ถูกสร้างขึ้น มันจะทำหน้าที่เป็นข้อมูลอ้างอิงที่ปลอดภัยสำหรับรายละเอียดบัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้ของผู้ใช้ปลายทาง คุณสามารถใช้ token นี้สำหรับการทำธุรกรรมในอนาคต โดยอิงตามข้อตกลงความยินยอมของคุณกับผู้ใช้ปลายทาง

กรณีการใช้งานทั่วไปสำหรับ Payment Tokens:

  1. Customer-Initiated Transactions (สำหรับลูกค้าที่กลับมาใช้บริการอีกครั้ง) - ช่วยให้ผู้ใช้สามารถใช้บัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้สำหรับการซื้อครั้งต่อไปได้อย่างราบรื่น เพื่อปรับปรุงอัตราความสำเร็จ เราขอแนะนำให้แจ้งให้ผู้ใช้ป้อน CVN ซ้ำเมื่อทำธุรกรรมเสร็จสมบูรณ์ ดูคู่มือการเชื่อมต่อของเรา

  2. Merchant-Initiated Transactions (สำหรับการชำระเงินแบบ Recurring) - คุณสามารถเริ่มต้นธุรกรรมได้โดยไม่ต้องมีการโต้ตอบจากผู้ใช้ปลายทาง (เช่น สำหรับ subscriptions หรือ auto-debits) เหมาะสำหรับบริการแบบสมัครสมาชิก (subscription-based services) การเป็นสมาชิก และการเรียกเก็บเงินอัตโนมัติ ดูคู่มือการเชื่อมต่อของเรา

บันทึกส่วนตัว

การเรียกดูบัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้หลายใบ (ยังไม่รองรับ)

เมื่อมีการร้องขอ payment methods เราจะส่งคืนบัตรทั้งหมดที่จัดเก็บไว้สำหรับผู้ซื้อรายใดรายหนึ่ง โดย Xendit จะส่งคืน masked card number และวันหมดอายุ

ตัวอย่างเช่น ผู้ซื้อรายเดียวกันอาจมีบัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้สองใบ เมื่อร้องขอ stored payment methods กับ Xendit บัตรทั้งสองใบจะถูกส่งคืนดังนี้:

Masked card number

วันหมดอายุ

431245 **** **** 5512

11/32

512512 **** **** 1241

07/30

ตัวอย่างคำขอเพื่อเรียกดูรายละเอียดบัตรที่จัดเก็บไว้

Request -

{ 
  THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}

Response from

{   
 THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}
SeoTitle: บันทึกบัตร

Title: Guardar una tarjeta
Content:
Para simplificar el proceso de pago para los Clientes recurrentes, la tokenización de tarjetas de Xendit ofrece una solución segura y eficiente al permitirle almacenar de forma segura los detalles de la tarjeta del Cliente. Esto elimina la necesidad de que los Clientes vuelvan a ingresar su información en cada compra, lo que resulta en un proceso de pago más fluido. Usted puede almacenar múltiples tarjetas por Cliente con One-Click Payments with CVN o Merchant-Initiated Transactions.

Flujo para almacenar la tarjeta

Notas privadas

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Store card details
 Client ->> Server: Store card initiation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_token_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes authentication  process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_token_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_token_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment_token webhook
 Server ->> Server: Store token_details

Cómo integrar

  1. Crear una Payment Session

    Para comenzar el proceso de tokenización, usted necesita Crear una Payment Session con Xendit. El session_type debe ser SAVE, y el amount debe ser 0.

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 0,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

    Request - POST /sessions

    {
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T07:03:19.571Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 0,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-d7b12124-3dd1-471a-bf37-c956f44c2a2c",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-28T07:33:19.376Z",
    "session_type": "SAVE",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": false
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

  1. Recopilar la información de la tarjeta

Implemente {{variable.card_session_js}} para recopilar la información de la tarjeta.

Request - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Request using cards_sessions_js

const cardData = {
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Xendit.payment.collectCardData(cardData, responseHandler);

Response - {{variable.card_session_js}}

// Handle the response message
const xenditResponseHandler = async (err, response) => { 
    console.log (response);
}
// The response object will look similar to this:
{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID", 
    "action_url": "REDIRECT_URL" 
}

Importante: Usted debe almacenar el payment_token_id devuelto en esta response y enviarlo a su server. Este payment_token_id es crucial para rastrear el Estado de la tokenización de la tarjeta y para futuras Transacciones.

  1. Redirigir a la página de authentication

    Después de recopilar la información de la tarjeta, su Cliente tendrá que ser redirigido a una página de authentication 3D Secure (3DS) alojada por el Banco emisor. Tras la authentication exitosa, el Cliente será redirigido de vuelta a su página de éxito especificada (p. ej., https://yourcompany.com/success).

  2. Recibir el webhook

    Xendit envía un webhook de token de pago a su webhook endpoint, proporcionando actualizaciones sobre el progreso de activación del token de pago. Asegúrese de escuchar el webhook para confirmar el Estado de almacenamiento de la tarjeta.

Ejemplo de webhook payment_token.activation

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.601Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment_token.activation",
    "data": {
        "status": "ACTIVE",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T03:57:19.330Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T03:57:21.215Z",
        "currency": "IDR",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-9f02010d-1189-4f2c-95e9-fe7f52fdd29b",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "efe51f0c-ea1f-45ec-96e4-5275db384d68_1b0d11cd-a",
        "token_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7344942402526026003955",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435203752181",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            }
        },
        "payment_token_id": "pt-eda13864-5091-4bd2-b88d-ae640be90ee7",
        "channel_properties": {
            "card_details": {
                "type": "CREDIT",
                "issuer": "BRI",
                "country": "ID",
                "network": "VISA",
                "expiry_year": "2040",
                "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
                "expiry_month": "12",
                "cardholder_email": "test@yourdomain.com",
                "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
                "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
                "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
                "cardholder_phone_number": "+62812347290"
            },
            "skip_three_ds": true,
            "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
            "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
            "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success"
        }
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

  1. Obtener la tarjeta almacenada

    Después de que la tarjeta haya sido tokenizada exitosamente (y usted haya recibido el webhook payment_token.activation), usted puede Obtener los detalles del token realizando un GET request a payment_tokens/YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID.

    Response - /v3/payment_tokens

    {   
    "payment_token_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_TOKEN_ID",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "customer_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "actions": [],
    "created": "2024-12-05T02:05:56.176308Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-05T02:19:02.935905Z",
    "channel_properties": {
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "cardholder_first_name": "Jaap",
            "cardholder_last_name": "Stam",
            "cardholder_email": "Jaap@stam.com",
            "cardholder_phone_number": "+6512341234",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2040",
            "fingerprint": "635a0be115cf90001ae83752",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "BRI"
        },
        "card_on_file_type": "CUSTOMER_UNSCHEDULED",
        "card_verification_results": {
            "three_ds_data": {
                "three_ds_flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "eci_code": "05",
                "three_ds_result": "AUTHENTICATED",
                "three_ds_result_reason": null,
                "three_ds_version": "2.1.0"
            },
            "cvn_result": null,
            "address_verification_result": "MATCH"
        }
    },
    "channel_code": "CARDS"
}

Usar el token de pago para futuras Transacciones

Una vez que se genera un token de pago, este actúa como una Referencia segura a los detalles de la tarjeta almacenada del usuario final. Usted puede usar este token para futuras Transacciones, basándose en su acuerdo de consentimiento con el usuario final.

Casos de Uso Comunes para los Tokens de Pago:

  1. Transacciones Iniciadas por el Cliente (Clientes Recurrentes) - permite a los usuarios usar sin problemas las tarjetas almacenadas para su próxima compra. Para mejorar la tasa de éxito, recomendamos solicitar a los usuarios que vuelvan a ingresar su CVN al completar la Transacción. Consulte nuestra guía de integración

  2. Merchant-Initiated Transactions (Pagos Recurrentes) - usted puede iniciar la Transacción sin la interacción del usuario final (p. ej., para suscripciones o débitos automáticos). Ideal para servicios basados en suscripción, membresías y facturación automatizada. Consulte nuestra guía de integración

Notas privadas

Obtener múltiples tarjetas almacenadas (AÚN NO SOPORTADO)

Al solicitar los métodos de pago, devolvemos todas las tarjetas almacenadas para un Cliente específico. Xendit devuelve el número de tarjeta enmascarado, así como la Fecha de expiración.

Por ejemplo, el mismo Cliente podría tener dos tarjetas almacenadas; al solicitar los métodos de pago almacenados con Xendit, esas dos tarjetas se devolverían de la siguiente manera:

Número de tarjeta enmascarado

Fecha de expiración

431245 **** **** 5512

11/32

512512 **** **** 1241

07/30

Ejemplo de request para Obtener los detalles de la tarjeta almacenada

Request -

{ 
  THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}

Response from

{   
 THIS FLOW IS NOT YET SUPPORTED
}
Description: How to store/save a card with Xendit
